description_long: This is a two-story apartment building with a steep, gabled roof and a mix of brick and stone textures on its exterior walls. The front facade features a central entrance with a small porch, flanked by symmetrical windows and a decorative gable above. A wrought-iron fence encloses the property, with a gate providing access to a paved driveway and walkway. Mature trees and shrubs are present in the front and side yards, adding greenery and shade. The building includes a balcony on the upper floor, visible from the front, and multiple windows arranged in a regular pattern on all sides. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and Victorian architectural influences, with detailed trim and a prominent roofline.
description: A two-story brick and stone apartment building with a steep gabled roof, central entrance, balcony, and fenced yard, featuring symmetrical windows and mature landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, symmetrical windows, and a large tree in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side windows, and the depth of the building's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back wall, fenced perimeter, and absence of main entrances.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side windows, fence, and a large tree near the sidewalk.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with regular spacing and alignment on all visible facades.
